name: forkmind
description: Local-first LLM branching & debugging tool for Claude Code. Treat AI context windows like a Git repo.

plugins.name: forkmind
plugins.description: Capture, branch, and regression-test LLM calls as a DAG — plus context capsules: offload conversation context into encrypted, immutable DAG snapshots and restore on demand. Free & local via Ollama, any OpenAI-compatible API, and MCP for agents.
